title: Go runtime config and external data-dir parity
scope: Go runtime now requires an explicit external data dir and centralizes Prism data roots for DB, uploads, attachments, logs, backups, and config. This is local/copied-data runtime plumbing only; it does not change Pi, Caddy, frontend default routing, production DB ownership, or Python runtime ownership.

resolved_roots.db: explicit --db / PRISM_GO_DB; relative paths resolve under data_dir

runtime_evidence: GET /healthz reports data_dir, db_path, uploads_dir, attachments_dir, logs_dir, backups_dir, and config_dir
Go unit tests reject missing data-dir
Go unit tests resolve relative DB paths under data-dir and reject traversal
boundaries: Does not implement Go fresh DB init.
Does not implement Go migration runner.
Does not promote Go writes/files to live/default ownership.
Does not deploy to Pi, edit Caddy, change systemd, or remove Python.
